title: solanum jasminoides var. boerhaviifolium
intro: Solanum jasminoides var. boerhaviifolium, also known as Boerhavia or Spiked Snakeroot, is a perennial herb belonging to the Solanaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and diuretic properties. The health benefits of Solanum jasminoides var. boerhaviifolium include relief from fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and reduce stress. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by drying the leaves and roots, and can be consumed as teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
